bottleneck_identified: Synchronous re-rendering of the entire conditions grid on every keystroke in ConditionsExplorer.tsx causing poor INP.
fix_applied: Debounced the search input using a 300ms timeout so the heavy filtering and DOM update runs after the user pauses typing.
expected_improvement: Better Interaction to Next Paint (INP) during search by decoupling typing from heavy DOM updates.
how_to_verify: 1. Run pnpm dev. 2. Navigate to /conditions. 3. Type quickly in the search box while observing the performance tab. It should not stutter on each keystroke.
